title: Lemon Dutch Lentil Curry
description: A sour, shaggy curry that blends Dutch lentils with citrusy lemon, turmeric, and aromatic spices for a monsoon‑style dish.

ingredients.name: Lemon
ingredients.amount: 1 large, juice and zest (2 tbsp juice, 1 tsp zest)

instructions: Rinse the Dutch lentils under cold water until the water runs clear.
Add lentils, water, and a pinch of salt to a pot, bring to a boil, then simmer uncovered for 20 minutes or until tender.
Heat coconut oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Sauté diced onion until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and grated ginger, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Sprinkle turmeric, cumin, coriander, and chili powder, tossing to coat and cooking for another 1 minute.
Pour in lemon juice and zest, stirring to combine, and let the spice mixture cook for 2 minutes.
Stir the cooked lentils into the skillet, ensuring they are coated with the curry base.
Simmer the combined curry for 5 minutes, letting flavors meld, then taste and adjust salt as needed.
